hero.title: Reborn for the Modern Era
hero.subtitle: Minimizing turnaround time and reducing operational costs across all Egyptian maritime ports.

about.title: A Leading Force in Egyptian Shipping
about.p1: CSA Marine is an Egyptian ship agency company established on 23 August 2016, specializing in full ship agency operations across all Egyptian maritime ports.
about.p2: With our deep understanding of local maritime regulations and strong relationships with port authorities, we guarantee seamless operations from arrival to departure. Our commitment is to provide fast, reliable, and cost-effective services to our global clients.
about.rebates_desc: With our direct connection to the Suez Canal Authority, we can propose highly competitive rebates to owners who choose to pass by for specific routes and trades.

contact.title: Ready to Assist You
contact.desc: Optimize your maritime operations with our expert agency services. Provide your vessel details below, and our specialized team will deliver a tailored proposal within hours.
contact.support_desc: Our team is always on standby across all Egyptian ports to ensure zero delays.
contact.response_desc: Expect a detailed PDA (Proforma Disbursement Account) shortly after submission.

news.title: Maritime Intelligence
news.desc: Stay updated with the latest Suez Canal circulars, toll changes, and Egyptian port holiday schedules to optimize your voyage planning.
news.desc_note: * Note: Vessel transits and port operations generally continue 24/7. Holidays primarily affect administrative and customs offices.

suez_page.title: Suez Canal Transit
suez_page.subtitle: Navigating the world's most critical waterway with precision, expertise, and unparalleled local support.
suez_page.feat1_desc: Full management of the daily convoy system and arrival notifications.
suez_page.feat2_desc: Strategic guidance to minimize waiting time and optimize vessel speed.
suez_page.feat3_desc: Direct coordination with the Suez Canal Authority for seamless clearance.

services.title: FULL SERVICE AGENCY
services.desc: We provide comprehensive ship agency services, ensuring every aspect of your vessel's port call is managed with precision and expertise.
services.s1_desc: Full coordination of vessel arrival and departure operations at ports.
services.s2_desc: Direct communication with port authorities and relevant regulatory bodies.
services.s3_desc: Arrangement of crew services including crew change transfer and accommodation.
services.s4_desc: Preparation and processing of all required shipping documentation.
services.s5_desc: Organization of vessel provisions and supply services (ship chandling).
services.s6_desc: Full agency representation for vessels across Egyptian ports and territorial waters.

why_us.title: WHY CHOOSE US
why_us.desc: We are dedicated to providing the highest standard of maritime agency services, ensuring your vessels are handled with priority and care.
why_us.r1_desc: With all official approvals and open tonnage coverage.
why_us.r2_desc: From documentation to crew services to cargo supervision.
why_us.r3_desc: Across all Egyptian maritime ports from Alexandria to Port Said to Suez.
why_us.r4_desc: Focused on minimizing vessel turnaround time and reducing operational costs.

footer.about: Established in 2016, C.S.A Marine is a leading Egyptian ship agency providing full vessel operations across all Egyptian maritime ports.

news_items.c1_desc: New transit toll structures for tankers and dry bulk vessels are now in effect for the 2026 fiscal year. These adjustments are designed to align with global market trends.
news_items.c2_desc: Updated rebate percentages for specific long-haul routes. Contact our agency for a detailed calculation of your potential savings.
news_items.c3_desc: New protocols for vessel spacing and convoy sequence have been implemented to enhance safety and transit efficiency.

accreditation.desc: The company possesses all necessary licenses and approvals to function as a ship agency in Egypt, including:
accreditation.hero_desc: We strictly adhere to all international maritime standards and local regulations, ensuring risk-free operations for our global clients.
accreditation.a1_desc: Proud official member of the Alexandria Chamber of Shipping.
accreditation.a2_desc: Granted by the Egyptian Maritime Transport Authority, covering all Egyptian maritime ports.
accreditation.a3_desc: Fully authorized for shipping agency operations without tonnage restrictions.
accreditation.a4_desc: Specific clearance to perform comprehensive ship agency activities at Port Said Port.
accreditation.a5_desc: Officially registered on the Egyptian Maritime Transport Sector digital platform.
